research_note.summary: Bounded negative: the portfolio's first thinking-enabled run returned empty content because the provider counts reasoning tokens against max_tokens and the model's reasoning alone consumed the 4000-token cap. The local reasoning trace shows on-task contract drafting cut before emission. The cap-confound question from pilot 002 remains open and moves to the next admission with a reasoning-aware cap.
what_worked: Preflight, containment, trace boundaries, and no-retry discipline all held on a novel configuration.
The reasoning trace (local-only) demonstrates the model approaches the task sensibly under thinking mode, including explicit line-range estimation.
what_failed: max_tokens=4000 was consumed entirely by reasoning (reasoning_tokens=4000, content_tokens=0, finish_reason=length).
No reviewable artifact was produced, so the pilot contributes no evidence about locator quality or abstraction quality.
negative_results: DeepSeek V4 Pro thinking mode shares the max_tokens budget between reasoning and content; caps sized for content-only contracts produce empty artifacts.
A thinking-enabled grounded contract on this excerpt needs a cap well above 4000; the reasoning trace alone was about 4000 tokens and unfinished.
reusable_by_other_labs: When enabling thinking on OpenAI-compatible providers, verify whether reasoning tokens count against max_tokens before sizing the cap.
Record reasoning_tokens and content_tokens separately in export metadata for thinking-enabled runs.
An empty-content completion still satisfies 'produced output' for no-retry purposes; plan caps so this cannot happen silently.
do_not_repeat: Do not run thinking-enabled contracts with content-sized caps.
Do not treat an on-task reasoning trace as evidence of method quality; only emitted, reviewed artifacts count.
Do not copy raw reasoning traces into committed records or currentness docs.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
